deferred_amount_semantics: Deferred shortfall / yield fulfillment is tracked off current pull-claimable balance until claimed.

funds_ledger.withdrawn_note: Per-token held/released/refunded/withdrawn summed across scenarios — not one physical ledger.
funds_ledger.legacy_claimable_note: terminal_value_total sums legacy :claimable; classified_* sums :claimable-v2 domains only.

accrued_fees.note: Accrued protocol fees via record-fee; parallel to :fees/protocol claimable domain.

terminal_observations.aggregation_note: classified_* sums :claimable-v2 only; terminal_value_total sums legacy :claimable.

reserve_shortfall.boundary_reason: Deferred shortfall repair; not current pull-claimable until fulfilled.

liability_challenge_bounty.boundary_reason: Challenge bounty; bounded by appeal lifecycle, no dedicated boundary row.

yield_resolver_incentive.boundary_reason: Yield resolver incentive; no dedicated fee-boundary row.

liability_slash_reserve.boundary_reason: Slash reserve inflow; pairs with liability-slash-boundary for bounty outflows.

bond_forfeit.boundary_reason: Bond forfeit inflow; bond-boundary covers refund path only.

yield_protocol_fee.boundary_reason: Yield protocol fee slice; fee-boundary applies to :fees/* domains.
